about.title: About Us
about.quote: Photography is an itch that won't go away. No matter how much you scratch it.
about.subtitle: We specialize in creating stunning visuals that resonate emotionally and creatively. Whether it's through the lens of a camera or the framing of a cinematic shot. We strive to bring authenticity and artistry to every project.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.standard_subtitle: All files includes RAW + 35 Edited Pictures

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind or need a photographer or filmmaker to bring your vision to life? We'd love to hear from you!
contact.name: Your Name

footer.subtitle_1: Reach out for inquiries, collaborations, or just to say hello—I'd love to connect with you.
